headline: Air Products Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: The Board of Directors of Air Products (NYSE: APD) today declared a quarterly dividend of $1.81 per share of common stock.

headline: Air Products (APD) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift After Analyst Target Increases
summary: Air Products and Chemicals sits in focus after a cluster of analyst price target moves, with bullish targets now grouped in a US$342 to US$358 range and an internal fair value estimate updated to US$335.95 from US$327.86. Many of these revisions are tied to expectations around upcoming quarterly execution, portfolio decisions, and how those factors feed into valuation work across the Street. As you read on, you will see how these shifting price targets connect to the evolving narrative and...

headline: Air Products Awarded Long-Term Taiwan Semiconductor Supply Deal
summary: APD secures a long-term Taiwan deal to supply gases and infrastructure for new chip fabs and packaging sites tied to AI demand.

raw.headline: Air Products Awarded Long-Term Taiwan Semiconductor Supply Deal
raw.summary: APD secures a long-term Taiwan deal to supply gases and infrastructure for new chip fabs and packaging sites tied to AI demand.

headline: Air Products to Expand Integrated Gas Supply Network for Semiconductor Manufacturer in Taiwan
summary: Air Products (NYSE:APD), a world-leading industrial gases company, today announced Air Products San Fu has been awarded a long-term agreement to support a semiconductor manufacturer's expansion in Taiwan. The project will supply multiple new semiconductor fabs and back-end packaging facilities, supporting growing demand driven by artificial intelligence and high-performance computing.
